title: Dragons Wrath
description: Dragon’s Wrath is a legendary weapon system that introduces three powerful, one-of-a-kind weapons to your Minecraft server.
body:
# 🐉 **DragonsWrath**

**DragonsWrath** is a high-stakes legendary relic system designed for competitive Minecraft servers.

Unlike standard gear plugins, DragonsWrath introduces **Global Uniqueness** — only **one instance of each legendary weapon** can exist on the server at any given time.

This creates a true **“King of the Hill”** dynamic where players must:

* Hunt
* Defend
* Protect
* Sacrifice

…to maintain control of the most powerful artifacts in the world.

## ⚔️ The Sovereign Relics

Each relic features unique attributes and hard-coded mechanics that define its playstyle.

### 🏹 **Dragon’s Wrath** (The Longbow)

The ultimate ranged counter weapon.

* Power VIII
* Punch IV
* Designed for absolute **zone control**
* Dominates open-field engagements

### 💜 **Oblivion’s Edge** (The Greatsword)

A blade worthy of kings.

* Sharpness VII
* Passive **AoE Shockwave**
* Instantly removes **25% of max health** from all nearby enemies

Built for aggressive frontline dominance.

### 🔨 **The Crusher** (The Heavy Mace)

A brutal, high-risk powerhouse.

* Density VI
* Massive burst potential
* Enforces a **Flight Ban**

Players **cannot equip or use an Elytra** while carrying The Crusher.

Power demands sacrifice.

# 🔥 Core Features

## 🏛️ The Ancient Forge (`/forge`, `/dw`)

A custom, dynamic GUI where players attempt to craft legends.

### 🔍 Live Tracking

The Forge shows in real time whether a relic is:

* ✅ Available
* ❌ Held by a specific player

No guessing. No duplicates.

### 🩸 Ritual Requirements

Forging requires massive sacrifices, including:

* Nether Stars
* Netherite Blocks
* Heavy Cores
* Other rare materials

Legends are not cheap.

### 🎲 The Gamble

Forging **The Crusher** has a hard-coded **25% success rate**.

If the ritual fails?

The materials are consumed by the void.

## 🔒 Global Uniqueness & Anti-Hoarding

### 🧬 One-Per-Server System

Each relic uses a **PersistentDataContainer “ID Card” system**.

If a relic exists:

* In any player’s inventory
* Stored anywhere in the world
* Logged in the server database

The Forge automatically seals that weapon for everyone else.

There can only be one.

### 📣 The Aetheric Shriek

When a relic holder dies:

* A Wither Roar echoes across the entire server
* The weapon becomes forgeable again

Power is never permanent.

# 🛠️ Admin Controls (`/dwadmin`)

Admins maintain total control over the relic economy via a dedicated management GUI.

### 🔐 Toggle Release

Seal or unseal weapons for:

* Server events
* Story progression
* Competitive resets

### ♻️ Force Vacate

Manually reset a relic claim if:

* A player is inactive
* A player is banned

### 👁️ Live Status

See instantly:

* Which relics exist
* Who holds them
* What is available

# 🎮 Commands & Permissions

| Command         | Description                   | Permission      |
| --------------- | ----------------------------- | --------------- |
| `/dragonswrath` | Opens the Ancient Forge       | Default         |
| `/forge`        | Opens the Ancient Forge       | Default         |
| `/dw`           | Alias for Forge               | Default         |
| `/dwadmin`      | Opens Admin Control Dashboard | `dw.admin` (OP) |

# 🎯 Designed For

* Hardcore SMPs seeking meaningful end-game content
* Factions & Lifesteal servers moving beyond “God-set” saturation
* Lore-driven worlds where unique items shape the narrative
* Competitive servers that want real power hierarchy
